item.title: Il fortune di numerone uno [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Il fortune di numerone uno [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: numerone
item.itunes:summary:
Il fortune di numerone uno
(Internet Apps)
Il fortune di numerone rivisitato per essere scritto col framework uno.
Si basa su un server esterno di mia proprietà nelle quale ho messo delle massime che escono.
La particolarità è che per sessione non escono doppioni, se non in particolari circostanze.
Vuole essere un fortune teller e va usato sui pc con NPU perché è parzialmente sensiente
The debian packages already includes the libskiasharp and the libharfbuzzsharp for all platforms.
[read more]
item.description:
Il fortune di numerone uno
(Internet Apps)
Il fortune di numerone rivisitato per essere scritto col framework uno.
Si basa su un server esterno di mia proprietà nelle quale ho messo delle massime che escono.
La particolarità è che per sessione non escono doppioni, se non in particolari circostanze.
Vuole essere un fortune teller e va usato sui pc con NPU perché è parzialmente sensiente
The debian packages already includes the libskiasharp and the libharfbuzzsharp for all platforms.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Il fortune di numerone uno
(Internet Apps)
Il fortune di numerone rivisitato per essere scritto col framework uno.
Si basa su un server esterno di mia proprietà nelle quale ho messo delle massime che escono.
La particolarità è che per sessione non escono doppioni, se non in particolari circostanze.
Vuole essere un fortune teller e va usato sui pc con NPU perché è parzialmente sensiente
The debian packages already includes the libskiasharp and the libharfbuzzsharp for all platforms.
[read more]

item.title: Download AetherSX2 For Linux [Emulation]
item.itunes:title: Download AetherSX2 For Linux [Emulation]
item.itunes:author: litegapps
item.itunes:summary:
Download AetherSX2 For Linux
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 has grown beyond its Android roots and brought great PlayStation 2 emulation to Linux, especially for ARM-based devices. With this change, people can play old PS2 games on devices like the Raspberry Pi and even a Nintendo Switch that has been modified to run Linux.
Installation is usually easy because there are AppImage and Flatpak versions available, which makes it easier for many people to get started. It's highly recommended that you change the graphics renderer from OpenGL to Vulkan for the best performance. This change can make the game run much more smoothly. The original AetherSX2 is no longer being worked on, but it lives on as a great way for Linux users who love retro games to explore the huge PlayStation 2 library.
[read more]
item.description:
Download AetherSX2 For Linux
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 has grown beyond its Android roots and brought great PlayStation 2 emulation to Linux, especially for ARM-based devices. With this change, people can play old PS2 games on devices like the Raspberry Pi and even a Nintendo Switch that has been modified to run Linux.
Installation is usually easy because there are AppImage and Flatpak versions available, which makes it easier for many people to get started. It's highly recommended that you change the graphics renderer from OpenGL to Vulkan for the best performance. This change can make the game run much more smoothly. The original AetherSX2 is no longer being worked on, but it lives on as a great way for Linux users who love retro games to explore the huge PlayStation 2 library.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Download AetherSX2 For Linux
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 has grown beyond its Android roots and brought great PlayStation 2 emulation to Linux, especially for ARM-based devices. With this change, people can play old PS2 games on devices like the Raspberry Pi and even a Nintendo Switch that has been modified to run Linux.
Installation is usually easy because there are AppImage and Flatpak versions available, which makes it easier for many people to get started. It's highly recommended that you change the graphics renderer from OpenGL to Vulkan for the best performance. This change can make the game run much more smoothly. The original AetherSX2 is no longer being worked on, but it lives on as a great way for Linux users who love retro games to explore the huge PlayStation 2 library.
[read more]

item.title: AetherSX2 For MAC [Emulation]
item.itunes:title: AetherSX2 For MAC [Emulation]
item.itunes:author: litegapps
item.itunes:summary:
AetherSX2 For MAC
(Emulation)
Great news for Mac gamers! AetherSX2, the highly acclaimed PlayStation 2 emulator celebrated for its stellar performance on Android, has officially launched for macOS. This development unlocks the vast and beloved library of PS2 classics for a new audience, specifically optimized for Apple Silicon (M1, M2, and beyond).
Leveraging the power of Apple's modern architecture and the Metal graphics API, AetherSX2 delivers impressive performance and high compatibility. Now, you can enjoy timeless titles like *Final Fantasy X*, *Metal Gear Solid 3*, and *Gran Turismo 4* directly on your MacBook or Mac desktop. Dive back into the golden era of gaming today!
[read more]
item.description:
AetherSX2 For MAC
(Emulation)
Great news for Mac gamers! AetherSX2, the highly acclaimed PlayStation 2 emulator celebrated for its stellar performance on Android, has officially launched for macOS. This development unlocks the vast and beloved library of PS2 classics for a new audience, specifically optimized for Apple Silicon (M1, M2, and beyond).
Leveraging the power of Apple's modern architecture and the Metal graphics API, AetherSX2 delivers impressive performance and high compatibility. Now, you can enjoy timeless titles like *Final Fantasy X*, *Metal Gear Solid 3*, and *Gran Turismo 4* directly on your MacBook or Mac desktop. Dive back into the golden era of gaming today!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AetherSX2 For MAC
(Emulation)
Great news for Mac gamers! AetherSX2, the highly acclaimed PlayStation 2 emulator celebrated for its stellar performance on Android, has officially launched for macOS. This development unlocks the vast and beloved library of PS2 classics for a new audience, specifically optimized for Apple Silicon (M1, M2, and beyond).
Leveraging the power of Apple's modern architecture and the Metal graphics API, AetherSX2 delivers impressive performance and high compatibility. Now, you can enjoy timeless titles like *Final Fantasy X*, *Metal Gear Solid 3*, and *Gran Turismo 4* directly on your MacBook or Mac desktop. Dive back into the golden era of gaming today!
[read more]

item.title: AetherSX2 For Windows [Emulation]
item.itunes:title: AetherSX2 For Windows [Emulation]
item.itunes:author: litegapps
item.itunes:summary:
AetherSX2 For Windows
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 emerged as a highly regarded PlayStation 2 emulator, primarily celebrated for its impressive performance on Android devices. For Windows users, the primary method to run AetherSX2 has been through Android emulators like BlueStacks, which allow PC systems to operate the Android version of the application. This approach grants access to AetherSX2's robust feature set, including resolution scaling, save states, and wide game compatibility, bringing classic PS2 titles to the desktop.
However, the original developer has officially halted the development of AetherSX2. As a result, users seeking the latest updates and bug fixes should now look towards NetherSX2, a community-driven project that continues the legacy of AetherSX2, ensuring ongoing support and improvements for the emulator.
[read more]
item.description:
AetherSX2 For Windows
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 emerged as a highly regarded PlayStation 2 emulator, primarily celebrated for its impressive performance on Android devices. For Windows users, the primary method to run AetherSX2 has been through Android emulators like BlueStacks, which allow PC systems to operate the Android version of the application. This approach grants access to AetherSX2's robust feature set, including resolution scaling, save states, and wide game compatibility, bringing classic PS2 titles to the desktop.
However, the original developer has officially halted the development of AetherSX2. As a result, users seeking the latest updates and bug fixes should now look towards NetherSX2, a community-driven project that continues the legacy of AetherSX2, ensuring ongoing support and improvements for the emulator.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AetherSX2 For Windows
(Emulation)
AetherSX2 emerged as a highly regarded PlayStation 2 emulator, primarily celebrated for its impressive performance on Android devices. For Windows users, the primary method to run AetherSX2 has been through Android emulators like BlueStacks, which allow PC systems to operate the Android version of the application. This approach grants access to AetherSX2's robust feature set, including resolution scaling, save states, and wide game compatibility, bringing classic PS2 titles to the desktop.
However, the original developer has officially halted the development of AetherSX2. As a result, users seeking the latest updates and bug fixes should now look towards NetherSX2, a community-driven project that continues the legacy of AetherSX2, ensuring ongoing support and improvements for the emulator.
[read more]

item.title: Xtra Kernel Manager - By Xtra Manager Software Project [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Xtra Kernel Manager - By Xtra Manager Software Project [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: gustyx-power
item.itunes:summary:
Xtra Kernel Manager - By Xtra Manager Software Project
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Xtra Kernel Manager is a kernel manager app for Android that allows users to control and optimize CPU performance and other system parameters more easily. Designed to provide a balance between performance and power efficiency, this app is suitable for users who want to get the best experience from their devices.

[read more]
item.description:
Xtra Kernel Manager - By Xtra Manager Software Project
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Xtra Kernel Manager is a kernel manager app for Android that allows users to control and optimize CPU performance and other system parameters more easily. Designed to provide a balance between performance and power efficiency, this app is suitable for users who want to get the best experience from their devices.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Xtra Kernel Manager - By Xtra Manager Software Project
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Xtra Kernel Manager is a kernel manager app for Android that allows users to control and optimize CPU performance and other system parameters more easily. Designed to provide a balance between performance and power efficiency, this app is suitable for users who want to get the best experience from their devices.

[read more]

item.title: StepMania [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: StepMania [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: eliasyfgm
item.itunes:summary:
StepMania
(Various Games)
StepMania is an advanced cross-platform rhythm game for home and arcade use. It was originally developed as a clone of Konami's arcade game series Dance Dance Revolution, and has since evolved into an extensible rhythm game engine capable of supporting a variety of rhythm-based game types.
Notes: This is only to provide an AppImage for Linux 64-bits, I am not the developer of this game. This version does NOT have a loading window because it was compiled without GTK (makes it easier to distribute as an AppImage ).

By default, StepMania will create a directory named ".stepmania-5.0" inside your Home folder. This is where you'll want to install songs, themes, noteskins, etc. For example:

/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Songs
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Themes
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/NoteSkins
...

Optionally, you can modify the "Preferences.ini" file located in the Save directory to add a custom songs folder or additional folders.
[read more]
item.description:
StepMania
(Various Games)
StepMania is an advanced cross-platform rhythm game for home and arcade use. It was originally developed as a clone of Konami's arcade game series Dance Dance Revolution, and has since evolved into an extensible rhythm game engine capable of supporting a variety of rhythm-based game types.
Notes: This is only to provide an AppImage for Linux 64-bits, I am not the developer of this game. This version does NOT have a loading window because it was compiled without GTK (makes it easier to distribute as an AppImage ).

By default, StepMania will create a directory named ".stepmania-5.0" inside your Home folder. This is where you'll want to install songs, themes, noteskins, etc. For example:

/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Songs
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Themes
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/NoteSkins
...

Optionally, you can modify the "Preferences.ini" file located in the Save directory to add a custom songs folder or additional folders.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
StepMania
(Various Games)
StepMania is an advanced cross-platform rhythm game for home and arcade use. It was originally developed as a clone of Konami's arcade game series Dance Dance Revolution, and has since evolved into an extensible rhythm game engine capable of supporting a variety of rhythm-based game types.
Notes: This is only to provide an AppImage for Linux 64-bits, I am not the developer of this game. This version does NOT have a loading window because it was compiled without GTK (makes it easier to distribute as an AppImage ).

By default, StepMania will create a directory named ".stepmania-5.0" inside your Home folder. This is where you'll want to install songs, themes, noteskins, etc. For example:

/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Songs
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/Themes
/home/yourName/.stepmania-5.0/NoteSkins
...

Optionally, you can modify the "Preferences.ini" file located in the Save directory to add a custom songs folder or additional folders.
[read more]

item.title: Tlum [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: Tlum [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Tlum
(Education Apps)
[DEMO] [Work in Progress: https://github.com/lyskouski/app-language] Open source code (whitebox) cross-platform language learning application leverages the power of natural language processing to pinpoint pronunciation gaps, computer vision to enhance articulation, and machine learning to boost vocabulary proficiency.

[read more]
item.description:
Tlum
(Education Apps)
[DEMO] [Work in Progress: https://github.com/lyskouski/app-language] Open source code (whitebox) cross-platform language learning application leverages the power of natural language processing to pinpoint pronunciation gaps, computer vision to enhance articulation, and machine learning to boost vocabulary proficiency.

[read more]

Tlum
(Education Apps)
[DEMO] [Work in Progress: https://github.com/lyskouski/app-language] Open source code (whitebox) cross-platform language learning application leverages the power of natural language processing to pinpoint pronunciation gaps, computer vision to enhance articulation, and machine learning to boost vocabulary proficiency.

[read more]

item.title: Ai Gate [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Ai Gate [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]
item.description:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ai Gate
(Utilities)
Ai-Gate brings ChatGPT, Google Bard, Perplexity AI and Anthropic Claude together as collection for your convenience. NO API key needed.

[read more]

item.title: Wheel of numerone's fortune [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: Wheel of numerone's fortune [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: numerone
item.itunes:summary:
Wheel of numerone's fortune
(Various Games)
wheel of numerone's fortune material
A fortune discover game for windows and linux in avalonia dialect material of Google. This project does not use the google's xaml stylesheet, but use the reactive ui of avalonia (it's read multitrheaded)·
The use case

The game is a family game to play together, to get to know English, so imagine you and your partner playing "guess the English sentence" and she shouts "as so long, not is so long".

This is the registered motto.

For installing in on windows you need the dotnet desktop runtime 9 (the latest version of 9), and for installing it on debian based systems you ned the repository of microsoft for downloading the dotnet framework.

More info can be find on the OpenCode readme.
[read more]
item.description:
Wheel of numerone's fortune
(Various Games)
wheel of numerone's fortune material
A fortune discover game for windows and linux in avalonia dialect material of Google. This project does not use the google's xaml stylesheet, but use the reactive ui of avalonia (it's read multitrheaded)·
The use case

The game is a family game to play together, to get to know English, so imagine you and your partner playing "guess the English sentence" and she shouts "as so long, not is so long".

This is the registered motto.

For installing in on windows you need the dotnet desktop runtime 9 (the latest version of 9), and for installing it on debian based systems you ned the repository of microsoft for downloading the dotnet framework.

More info can be find on the OpenCode readme.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Wheel of numerone's fortune
(Various Games)
wheel of numerone's fortune material
A fortune discover game for windows and linux in avalonia dialect material of Google. This project does not use the google's xaml stylesheet, but use the reactive ui of avalonia (it's read multitrheaded)·
The use case

The game is a family game to play together, to get to know English, so imagine you and your partner playing "guess the English sentence" and she shouts "as so long, not is so long".

This is the registered motto.

For installing in on windows you need the dotnet desktop runtime 9 (the latest version of 9), and for installing it on debian based systems you ned the repository of microsoft for downloading the dotnet framework.

More info can be find on the OpenCode readme.
[read more]

item.title: Solitario.avalonia [Card]
item.itunes:title: Solitario.avalonia [Card]
item.itunes:author: numerone
item.itunes:summary:
Solitario.avalonia
(Card)
Questa vuole essere la riproduzione digitale del solitario realmente esistente la torre di babele, fatta in avalonia.
Lo scopo del solitario è quello di ordinare le carte dal 10 al 2 su una unica riga.
Le regole ufficiali sono che ogni carta deve essere spostata almeno una volta, secondo la mia versione se vi trovate il 10 ed il 9 impilati all'inizio ed ad inizio riga non li dovete muovere.
L'unico obbligo è che le carte vanno spostate su carte più grandi, cioé il 3 sul 5 o sull'8 e non il contrario.

Questa versione richiede gli indici di riga, non è interattiva.

Prestate attenzione: richiede il dotnet framework, per cui è necessario installarsi anche il repository della microsoft, almeno su debian.
[read more]
item.description:
Solitario.avalonia
(Card)
Questa vuole essere la riproduzione digitale del solitario realmente esistente la torre di babele, fatta in avalonia.
Lo scopo del solitario è quello di ordinare le carte dal 10 al 2 su una unica riga.
Le regole ufficiali sono che ogni carta deve essere spostata almeno una volta, secondo la mia versione se vi trovate il 10 ed il 9 impilati all'inizio ed ad inizio riga non li dovete muovere.
L'unico obbligo è che le carte vanno spostate su carte più grandi, cioé il 3 sul 5 o sull'8 e non il contrario.

Questa versione richiede gli indici di riga, non è interattiva.

Prestate attenzione: richiede il dotnet framework, per cui è necessario installarsi anche il repository della microsoft, almeno su debian.
[read more]

Solitario.avalonia
(Card)
Questa vuole essere la riproduzione digitale del solitario realmente esistente la torre di babele, fatta in avalonia.
Lo scopo del solitario è quello di ordinare le carte dal 10 al 2 su una unica riga.
Le regole ufficiali sono che ogni carta deve essere spostata almeno una volta, secondo la mia versione se vi trovate il 10 ed il 9 impilati all'inizio ed ad inizio riga non li dovete muovere.
L'unico obbligo è che le carte vanno spostate su carte più grandi, cioé il 3 sul 5 o sull'8 e non il contrario.

Questa versione richiede gli indici di riga, non è interattiva.

Prestate attenzione: richiede il dotnet framework, per cui è necessario installarsi anche il repository della microsoft, almeno su debian.
[read more]
